case_title: MAJOR LEGAL SERVICES VS WILSON, DENNIS M. ESQ.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $128.25 FILED BY MAJOR LEGAL SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT WILSON, DENNIS M.   ESQ. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-26-1997 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WILSON, DENNIS M.   ESQ.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MAJOR LEGAL SERVICES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WILSON, DENNIS M.   ESQ. $128.25 PRINCIPAL, $57.82 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $186.07 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO THIRD PARTY WILSON,DENNIS M. HEARING SET FOR SEP-08-1997 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT C
NON SERVICE RETURN FOR OEX FILED.
OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF SEP-08-1997, OFF CALENDAR AS TO THIRD PARTY WILSON,DENNIS M.

ORDER OF EXAMINATION RETURNED SERVED, SERVICE DATE: OCT-14-1997 AS TO DEFENDANT WILSON, DENNIS M.   ESQ.
OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF NOV-24-1997, DISCHARGED AS TO DEFENDANT WILSON, DENNIS M.   ESQ.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT WILSON, DENNIS M.   ESQ.
